policy.ciFailCondition: Functional features must have API mappings present in /api/__debug/routes and test evidence files that exist on disk

features.releaseNote: Logs are grow-scoped for v1; keep top-level route out of navigation.

Personal tasks are not a top-level tab, but `/home/personal/tasks` is the shared out-of-nav Task Center/Schedule action layer for grow, ToolRun, recipe, course, live, alert, sensor, and forum follow-up tasks.

rules.v1: Implemented and intended for public release UI.
rules.post_v1: Product-owned but intentionally absent from v1 UI.
rules.internal: Backend, compatibility, inventory, or generated row not directly user-visible.
